title: Price Tag
why_this_song: Price Tag by Jessie J (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 25 times; first heard in: "It's not about the money, money, money"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Seems like everybody's got a price"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "We just wanna make the world dance"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Forget about the price tag"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Ain't about the, uh, cha-ching cha-ching"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Ain't about the, uh, cha-ching cha-ching
Ain't about the, yeah, ba-bling ba-bling
Yeah, yeah, well, keep the price tag and take the cash back
Just give me six strings (six strings) and a half-stack (half stack)
And you can, can keep the cars, leave me the garage

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "money" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "money" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "price" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "price" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Okay, Coconut man, Moonheads and Pea

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Seems like everybody's got a price
Everybody look to their left (to their left)
So we gon' keep everyone moving their feet

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Price Tag" was released in 2011. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Price Tag" foi lançada em 2011. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
